message:
fix: clean up polecatDir on agent bead retry failure in RepairWorktreeWithOptions (gt-ye70dz)

Add os.RemoveAll(polecatDir) in the error path when createAgentBeadWithRetry
fails, matching AddWithOptions cleanupOnError behavior. Without this, the
polecat directory remains but has no valid worktree, leaving it in a limbo
state where m.exists(name) returns true but the polecat is broken.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
